prompt: my claude setup feels really off - it keeps asking me permission for everything, the CLAUDE.md is like 2000 lines long and half of it is copy-pasted from some blog post, and it never remembers what I told it last session. Can you figure out what's wrong and fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies missing or broken memory system
Structures diagnosis using 7-pillar framework with scores
fixed-CLAUDE.md includes Engineering Standards section with domain opinions
